title: helichrysum pygmaeum
intro: Helichrysum pygmaeum, also known as dwarf everlast or small leaf helichrysum, is a small, shrub-like perennial plant native to Australia. It is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which make it effective in treating wounds, reducing swelling, and fighting off infections. The health benefits of helichrysum pygmaeum include reducing pain and inflammation, improving circulation, and promoting wound healing, making it a popular natural remedy for various health issues. Helichrysum pygmaeum is often used in herbal preparations such as teas, tinctures, and essential oils, which can be applied topically or ingested to reap its medicinal benefits.
